# Xnlab Studio (XNLAB)

> Worldbuilding studio for modern luxury. We design atmospheres, identities and visual systems for hospitality, nightlife, architecture and cultural identity. By appointment only.

The studio operates from a single mark — XNLAB — and a single email: studio@xnlab.io. Work happens slowly, with a small number of clients each year. The visual language is dark, cinematic, atmospheric. We design presence, not content.

## Pages

- [Home](https://xnlab.io): Landing — wordmark, four disciplines, selected works summary, contact.
- [Selected Works](https://xnlab.io/work): Case studies (currently 3 internal studies; real client work in progress).
- [Selected Work — Hospitality Atmosphere Study](https://xnlab.io/work/hospitality-atmosphere-study): Internal study on hospitality interiors.
- [Selected Work — Nightlife Visual System](https://xnlab.io/work/nightlife-visual-system): Internal study on nocturnal identity systems.
- [Selected Work — Architectural Identity](https://xnlab.io/work/architectural-identity): Internal study on emotional architecture.
- [About](https://xnlab.io/about): Studio philosophy, approach, beliefs, practice areas.
- [Process](https://xnlab.io/process): How we work in four movements — Listen, Map atmospheres, Build the system, Live with it. Includes tangible deliverables.
- [Collaboration](https://xnlab.io/collaboration): Practical notes on engaging the studio — when to reach out, what to send, the first conversation, engagement shape.
- [Manifesto](https://xnlab.io/manifesto): Six statements on worldbuilding, atmosphere and restraint.
- [References / Library](https://xnlab.io/references): Curated set of books, architects, films, hotels and makers that inform the studio's work.
- [Contact](https://xnlab.io/contact): Inquiry form. By appointment only.
- [Colophon](https://xnlab.io/imprint): Studio details, typography credits, technical stack, brief privacy and terms notes.

## Practice

- Hospitality Systems — atmospheres designed to be remembered.
- Nightlife Atmospheres — dark, cinematic environments for cultural energy.
- Emotional Architecture — spaces shaped through silence, light and material.
- Living Identities — symbols, avatars and identities with presence.

## Contact

- Email: studio@xnlab.io
- Availability: By appointment only.
